Topic 2: Featured story (the MAGA failure & their hypocrisy)

[204:50]And more to that point, I don't know that we'll even get into the energy crisis.

[204:54]We sort of already know about that.

[204:56]I want to talk about this polling because this is, goes hand in hand with everything

[205:01]I just said.

[205:04]So we now have the official public opinion polling on the war in Iran.

[205:09]And would you be surprised to learn, this is the biggest insight, in my opinion, that

[205:14]that the demographic that supports the war the most

[205:17]is actually MAGA Republicans.

[205:20]This is the data from NBC News.

[205:23]I'll just read it outright and we'll discuss it.

[205:26]It says, quote,

[205:27]A majority of registered voters disapprove of President Trump's handling of the situation

[205:33]in Iran and believe the U S should not have taken military action against the country,

[205:38]according to a new NBC News poll, 54% of voters disapprove of Trump's handling of Iran compared

[205:44]with 41% who approve a similar share of 52% versus 41% say the U S should not have taken

[205:53]The results show clear, if expected, partisan polarization over the issue, an overwhelming

[205:59]majority of Democrats, 89% say the US should not have struck Iran among independence, 58%

[206:07]believe that as well.

[206:09]Republicans are overall more supportive of the strikes, 77% say the US should have struck

[206:15]Iran 15% disagree.

[206:18]But, there is a significant divide between Republicans who identify as MAGA and those

[206:25]who do not.

[206:26]A full 90% of self-identified MAGA-aligned Republicans back the strikes with only 5% saying

[206:37]they don't think the strikes should have been launched.

[206:40]Among Republicans who do not see themselves as part of MAGA, they are more divided with

[206:45]54% supporting the strikes and 36% against them.

[206:50]NBC News poll also found a deep divide over the Iran war by age with younger voters, far

[206:56]more sour on the strikes than older voters.

[206:58]Two thirds of voters under 35 say the US should not have struck Iran.

[207:07]Voters with college degrees are about evenly split over the strikes.

[207:11]Those with bachelor's or postgraduate degrees overwhelmingly believe the U S should not have

[207:16]struck Iran.

[207:19]Now to me, this is just the nail in the coffin because maybe it needs to be sad.

[207:27]It's sort of sad that it does.

[207:30]When you go back to the original MAGA movement, when it all started, what this whole thing

[207:45]That we should put America first

[208:05]agenda, he said, this is a failure and we need to change.

[208:30]that he's not a true conservative, he's not of the establishment, he's not a loyal member

[208:40]is corrupt too.
